name: Bonusly Employee Recognition API
what_it_does: Bonusly employee recognition and rewards REST API for HR teams, people ops, and employers to automate peer-to-peer recognition, reward management, and employee engagement programs. Enables AI agents to manage bonus sending and recognition creation for automated employee recognition automation, handle user management and company configuration for HR system integration automation, access redemption catalog management for employee rewards program automation, retrieve analytics and recognition reporting for employee engagement insights automation, manage company value tagging for culture alignment tracking automation, handle integration with HRIS for employee lifecycle event recognition automation, access real-time recognition feed for company culture visibility automation, retrieve top performers and recognition frequency for talent management analytics automation, manage bulk recognition for milestone and work anniversary automation, and integrate Bonusly with Slack, Teams, HRIS platforms, and SSO for end-to-end employee recognition workflow.
use_cases: Automating anniversary recognition from HRIS event automation agents
Sending bulk recognition from HR milestone automation agents
Reporting engagement from culture analytics automation agents
Integrating recognition from Slack bot automation agents
not_for: Formal performance review and goal management (use Lattice or Betterworks)
Employee equity and compensation management (use Carta or Pave)
Large enterprise complex incentive compensation (use Xactly or CaptivateIQ)
best_when: An HR team or employer wanting AI agents to automate peer recognition sending, work anniversary and milestone celebrations, recognition analytics reporting, and HRIS-triggered recognition events within Bonusly's employee recognition platform.
avoid_when: TAX REPORTING FOR RECOGNITION REWARDS: Bonusly recognition rewards with cash equivalent value may be taxable employee income; automated reward redemption for rewards exceeding IRS de minimis fringe benefit threshold creates employee W-2 income that must be reported; ensure payroll integration for tax reporting before automated high-value recognition reward program deployment. ERISA EMPLOYEE BENEFIT PLAN CLASSIFICATION: Large-scale automated recognition programs with significant compensation value may be classified as ERISA welfare benefit plans requiring plan document, SPD, and Form 5500 filing; engage ERISA counsel before deploying automated recognition programs with substantial per-employee annual reward value. GDPR FOR EUROPEAN EMPLOYEE RECOGNITION DATA: Automated recognition and reward data for EU employees constitutes HR personal data under GDPR; automated recognition analytics and data export must comply with GDPR employee data processing requirements; recognition data transfers outside EU require GDPR transfer mechanism.

auth.notes: Bonusly uses API key and OAuth 2.0 authentication. REST API with JSON. Boulder, Colorado HQ. Founded 2012 by Raphael Crawford-Marks and John Quinn. Private (~$23M raised). Peer-to-peer recognition with point-based rewards. Integrations with Slack, Teams, Zoom, Workday, BambooHR, and Rippling. Redemption catalog with gift cards, charitable donations, and custom rewards. Competes with Kudos, Motivosity, and Achievers for employee recognition.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Core, Pro, and Custom tiers per user per month; recognition reward budget separate from platform subscription
pricing.notes: Boulder CO. Private (~$23M raised). Per-user monthly subscription. Reward budget separate. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; recognition and user queries throttled; webhooks for bonus and redemption events

known_agent_gotchas: POINT ALLOWANCE PERIOD FOR AUTOMATED BULK RECOGNITION: Each Bonusly user has a monthly point allowance; automated bulk recognition events must verify remaining point allowance before sending; automated recognition that exceeds sender point allowance creates failed recognition that requires manual resolution or reprocessing next allowance period

COMPANY VALUE HASHTAG REQUIREMENT CONFIGURATION: Bonusly recognition can require company value hashtag inclusion; automated recognition creation must check company configuration for required hashtag format; automated recognition without required company value hashtag creates recognition that fails validation or posts without culture alignment tracking

AUTOMATED RECOGNITION AUTHENTICITY PERCEPTION: Automated recognition messages without personalization may be perceived as inauthentic by recipients; automated work anniversary recognition using generic templates creates recognition that feels formulaic rather than genuine; implement personalization tokens (name, tenure, team-specific content) in automated recognition templates for authentic experience

REDEMPTION CATALOG AVAILABILITY BY COUNTRY: Bonusly redemption catalog item availability varies by employee country/region; automated recognition programs for global employees must account for catalog item availability; automated reward programs that promise specific redemption items for international employees may create redemption disappointment if items are unavailable in their country

HRIS DEPROVISIONING LATENCY FOR TERMINATED EMPLOYEES: Automated recognition workflows triggered by HRIS events must account for employee termination deprovisioning lag; automated recognition sent to recently terminated employees creates recognition in inactive account; implement termination status check before automated recognition delivery for HRIS event-driven workflows
agent_readiness.security_notes: Employee recognition. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Employee recognition, reward, and engagement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee recognition. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Recognition, reward, and employee data.
